title: Disney Princess Purple Glitter Elastic Hair Band Headband Hair Bow for Girls
description:
Your little one is dressed to impress with this Disney Princess headwrap hair bow. With a glittery pink elastic strap and bright lavender bow featuring Belle, Ariel, and Tiana, this makes the perfect accessory for birthday parties, Halloween, dress up playdates, or just walking around town! The elastic headband makes sure your bow stays with you when you need it - no falling off in the middle of your runway performance! Bow is approximately 3.5" x 2.5". Recommended ages 3+

Disney Princess Purple Glitter Elastic Hair Band Headband Hair Bow for Girls

Your little one is dressed to impress with this Disney Princess headwrap hair bow. With a glittery pink elastic strap and bright lavender bow featuring Belle, Ariel, and Tiana, this makes the perfect accessory for birthday parties, Halloween, dress up playdates, or just walking around town! The elastic headband makes sure your bow stays with you when you need it - no falling off in the middle of your runway performance! Bow is approximately 3.5" x 2.5". Recommended ages 3+

Key Features

  • OFFICIALLY LICENSED - Dress up like your favorite Disney princesses with this bow featuring Belle, Ariel, and Tiana!
  • EASY TO WEAR - Full size elastic headband makes putting on and taking off the bow a breeze, no need for pesky clips and ties
  • CREATIVITY AND SELF EXPRESSION - Playing with hair accessories is a great way to encourage your little one to express their creativity, as well as finding their own personal style
  • GLITTERY PINK BAND - Headwrap comes with a glittery pink elastic band, perfect for adding a little bling to your outfit
  • AGES 3 AND UP - Recommended ages 3+
